_comment: Schema for {results_dir}/ingest.json — self-contained manifest for website ingestion.
output_license: ${CC0-1.0 if autonomous scout with no flags, CC-BY-4.0 if guided — from session.json metadata.output_license}
output_license_reason: ${autonomous | guided_target | guided_context | guided_papers | guided_interactive — from session.json metadata.output_license_reason}

attribution.contributor_name: ${display name from web profile, or null if anonymous}
attribution.citation_text: ${Pre-formatted citation string. CC0: 'Generated by MAGELLAN (magellan-discover.ai), a project by Alberto Trivero / Kakashi Venture Accelerator. Session: SESSION_ID.' CC-BY: 'Hypothesis generated by CONTRIBUTOR using MAGELLAN (magellan-discover.ai), a project by Alberto Trivero / Kakashi Venture Accelerator. Session: SESSION_ID.'}

empirical_validation._comment: Optional — populated if convergence scanner and/or dataset evidence miner ran (v5.13)

impact_assessment._comment: Optional — populated if impact tracking is enabled (v5.14)
impact_assessment.convergence_translational_signals: N (count of clinical trials + grants + patents with hits)

files._comment: Array of all files produced in this session's results directory. List every .json and .md file. Enables the website to know exactly what data is available without filename guessing.
